name: the-yoga-sutras-of-patanjali
description: Sri Swami Satchidananda's commentary on Patanjali's Yoga Sutras — practical toolkit for understanding the eight limbs, stilling the mind, overcoming kleshas, and realizing the true Self
useCase: Understand yoga's original purpose as mind control, practice the eight limbs, identify and overcome kleshas, and progress on the path from concentration to liberation
knownRisks: Satchidananda's commentary is one of many interpretations — other teachers may present different glosses on the same sutras
The text is rooted in Hindu cosmology which may conflict with some readers' worldviews
Practice described in the sutras can be intense — beginners should proceed gradually
